desc: Public school directory tracking geographic locations and administrative IDs.

columns.name: year
columns.desc: The specific school year the directory information represents.

columns.name: school_name
columns.desc: The official text name of the public school.

columns.name: ncessch
columns.desc: The 12-digit unique national public school ID used to cross-reference school directory details.

columns.name: leaid
columns.desc: The 7-digit unique Local Education Agency ID mapping the school directly to its school district.

columns.name: lea_name
columns.desc: The official text name of the Local Education Agency (the school district).

columns.name: county_code
columns.desc: The unique Federal Information Processing Series (FIPS) county code where the school is located.

columns.name: city_location
columns.desc: The city or municipality name where the school is physically located.

columns.name: urban_centric_locale
columns.desc: Classifier for the school's location environment (e.g., City, Suburb, Town, Rural).

columns.name: longitude
columns.desc: The precise geographic longitude coordinate of the school for mapping and distance math.

columns.name: latitude
columns.desc: The precise geographic latitude coordinate of the school for mapping and distance math.

columns.name: school_level
columns.desc: The operational level of the school (e.g., Primary, Middle, High, Other).

columns.name: school_type
columns.desc: The classification type of the school (e.g., Regular school, Special education).

columns.name: charter
columns.desc: An indicator flag indicating whether the institution is a public charter school.

columns.name: magnet
columns.desc: An indicator flag indicating whether the institution offers a magnet program or is a magnet school.

columns.name: virtual
columns.desc: An indicator classifying the school's level of virtual/remote instruction.

columns.name: enrollment
columns.desc: The total student enrollment count reported for the school during this directory year.

columns.name: teachers_fte
columns.desc: The total Full-Time Equivalent (FTE) classroom teacher count employed at the school.

columns.name: free_or_reduced_price_lunch
columns.desc: The total number of students eligible to receive free or reduced-price lunch.

columns.name: direct_certification
columns.desc: The count of students directly certified for free meals through assistance programs like SNAP.
